title: Enclosure
description: Enclosure is a server-side mod that allows players to manage and protect their homes.
body:
**Enclosure** can help players claim their lands (called "enclosure"), and manage other players' permissions, such as placing blocks, killing animals, etc.

[![ms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ab31c193b44401e859a4f5b230981b0e313fcf_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/enclosure/screenshots)

# Guide

Please see our [wiki](https://enclosure.fandom.com/wiki/Enclosure_Wiki) for more information.

Our wiki needs to be improved, it's welcomed to help us editing wiki.

# Features

* Exhaustive permission system
* *Vanilla*, this mod will not break any vanilla features, unless in a player's enclosure.
* Use GUI to configure permissions
* Sub-enclosure support
* Fix some vanilla "features"(like breaking bedrock, it will not affect on any block in the protection of Enclosure)
